title: medicago tornata subsp. striata
intro: Medicago tornata subsp. striata, also known as a subspecies of the perennial legume Medicago tornata, is a plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for soothing skin irritations and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant has been reported to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Medicago tornata subsp. striata may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
